Package index

All functions

genome(<GTFParquet>) seqinfo(<GTFParquet>)
GTFParquet class
GTFParquet()
Create a GTFParquet object
gene_types() transcript_types()
List available gene or transcript types
protein_coding_genes() lncRNA_genes()
Convenience functions for common gene types
genes(<GTFParquet>) transcripts(<GTFParquet>) exons(<GTFParquet>) cds(<GTFParquet>)
Extract genomic features from a GTFParquet object
gtf_metadata()
Get GTF metadata
genes_in_region() transcripts_in_region()
Find features overlapping a genomic region
transcriptsBy(<GTFParquet>) exonsBy(<GTFParquet>) cdsBy(<GTFParquet>)
Extract and group genomic features from a GTFParquet object
utrs() codons()
Extract UTR and codon features from a GTFParquet object
